search_queries_used: site:nice.org.uk NG56 multimorbidity annual review function frailty priorities treatment review
site:dha.gov.ae chronic disease annual review primary care UAE
candidate_sources_rejected: multimorbidity guidance treated as complete evidence for every disease-specific annual review
automatic disease targets, screening, laboratory panels, medicine changes, or intervals
automatic diagnosis, investigation, treatment, medication, dose, procedure, referral, escalation, or discharge instructions
search snippets, landing pages, and broad source-family matches without an exact applicable section
rejection_reasons: Actual chronic diseases require their own evidence.
Autonomous clinical output is outside this documentation-only research programme and was not mapped.
Only opened exact official documents and directly applicable sections were accepted as evidence.
population_applicability: Adults with multimorbidity or complex chronic-disease review needs; single-condition, paediatric, pregnancy, severe mental illness, palliative, and acute contexts require separate evidence.
setting_applicability: Primary-care documentation and follow-up as qualified by the exact source and clinical context.
UAE_applicability: International evidence requires UAE primary-care, laboratory, prescribing, referral, safeguarding, and local-pathway adaptation.
recency_verification: Exact official documents and sections were reviewed on 2026-07-14.
superseded_check: The cited exact source remains current on the issuing organisation website at the review date.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact multimorbidity section supports clinician review of conditions, treatment burden, function, frailty, medicines, and impact without assuming which chronic diseases are present.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports documenting long-term-condition burden, day-to-day activity difficulty, support from multiple services, frailty or falls context, number of regular medicines, gait and self-reported health assessment when actually completed.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact priorities section supports patient goals, preferences, quality of life, coordination, and agreed priorities without generating disease-specific management.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports documenting functional impact, mental and physical health interaction, treatment burden, carer involvement, independence, social activity, personal goals, values, priorities, and medicine concerns.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact treatment-review section supports recording reviewed results, medicine burden, clinician-entered plan, communication, and follow-up without changing treatment automatically.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports clinician-led review of benefits, harms, treatment burden, personal priorities, and a documented discussion about reducing or stopping treatment without generating a medication change.

unresolved_source_gaps: Specific diagnoses, disease control, observations, tests, targets, medicines, adverse effects, screening, referral, and interval remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
